Hey guys and welcome back. I wanted to just give you a little example walk through so you could see the couples therapy in action. So we have two examples for you both similar but with a bit of a different transition as we noted in the in the last session. So first one from Copy School 2017 subject line RE our relationship. So right off the bat it's really that relational recap based off of the initial core intent of them being on our list. So short history lesson at some point our paths cross. You said, hey Joe teach me how to do this email copy thing please please please show me how to write the kind of emails that make people get addicted to our brand and recommend us like crazy. How to string together email sequences and launch campaigns that crush those lofty goals. I said with my team on that last Zoom meeting and behind it all you said show me how to stop guessing at every word while generating big lifts hitting hockey stick forming acquisition goals and getting killer results in less time because I'm now a CTCM a confident and talented conversion mofo. Then a few days ago I hopped onto my convert kit soap box and said here you go. So don't be afraid or shy to literally put words in your prospects mouth. Now a lot of people would be hesitant that this tone is a little bit assertive but at the same time you're talking to buyers or at least you're trying to speak to the buyers on your list and you want to frame it as a way that you are reflecting back what those intentions may have been for people to get on your list the ones that are more primed to buy. So that's what's going on here you really want to give that recap framed in any combination of the moment of highest tension or at the moment of highest pleasure. Cool so then a few days ago I hopped on my convert kit soap box and said here you go. So we're framing that call to action as a reason of us a reason for us to make good on that relationship agreement. You know this is our role in that value exchange it's their role to take us up on it and we go with that presumption and while your inner growth marketer was screaming hell yes sign me up so we are saying they should have said yes based off of this relationship that we have with them based off of the initial core intent of them signing up to our list to begin with they should have said yes. You're fearful procrastinating lizard brain aka the one who points at job listings for middle management positions at Oracle said whoa slow down their champ let's wait a second see how we feel later. Well now's later I hear lizard and your lizard brains trying to hijack the controls and unless you and I partner up to do something about it right here right now your next big project if you even have the confidence to get it out the door will be straight-jacketed and sabotaged by the part of your brain still trying to avoid being by the mix by an imaginary T-rex. Not cool so here's how we're gonna do that bobble-eyed desert-tweller. So essentially here what we're saying is that based off of what our relationship is and the initial exchange we agreed between each other you should have said yes but there's just this resistance or fear in the way but instead of calling them out directly on that resistance we're actually having fun with it and externalizing it a bit we're saying that it's this imaginary T-rex so we could take their side in helping them overcome this procrastination so essentially we're anthropomorphizing their fear and resistance as this third-party thing and taking their side to overcome it so it's a little less confrontational while at the same time calling it for what it is. So your lizard brain doesn't care if copy school is right for you, right doesn't help you sleep at night, right doesn't generate the cash to cover payroll with the single email send so this is our transition into the perfect for you if section and essentially we're positioning against right. No one cares if something's right for them they want to know if it's going to pay off so they want to know that they're better than safe big payoff zero risk kind of safe so if you and your lizard brain can check off five of the seven boxes below I invite you to slip that lizard slip that lizard a stiff drink while you and I conspire to make you part of the top 1% of growth marketers on the planet so this is a classic part of the perfect for you if is that there is a very clear yes or no so five of seven seven of nine is usually what I like to go for there's a very clear yes criteria and a clear no criteria so you want them to know this before getting into the rest of the body so here are seven ways to know if you're ready to 10x your ROI using copy school so remember this isn't about if you're right for copy school this is if you're ready to get this result 10x your ROI using copy school number one this is someone who's already in the game trying to solve the problem or achieve the results your product provides we won't read it all I'll spare you having to read it all but yes this is where you're going to highlight someone who is actively trying to get that result and you're going to paint that in full detail number two and three is any you're just essentially covering other major audience segments personas or avatars that your product is geared towards that they may fall under so covering those extra buckets number four is a desirable trait they're already investing in adding conversion copywriting to their marketing stack they're already reading blog posts watching webinars studying the classics gene towards Claude Hopkins they're doing all these things the next one is that they just value their time you know they're aware and excited about the USP and outcomes of your product and they're willing and ready to like just take that time that they were doing you know scrolling their newsfeed per week and applying the lessons and templates and strategies and processes that will have the greatest and fastest impact on their business so this is really a concrete thing that they're willing to do to get these results another call to action number six is where you can transition to the more offer related aspects of it so they feel at ease remember this is still saying the guarantee but you're not breaking frame from what makes him a perfect buyer what makes him a perfect buyer is that they feel at ease knowing they have a full 60 days to give it a risk-free shot maybe you won't maybe you won't be able to dive in for a few weeks maybe you're still new to this copy thing and need some extra time to apply what you're learning either way you you totally appreciate having two full months to give copy school an honest shot seven you're in business and that's all that matters essentially saying that like as long as you are currently operating a business as long as you are writing copy as long as you are operational then you have an ROI to be had here so that's what we're saying here and we actually use this as a transition point to talk about the monthly plan most startups need cashflow which is why your eyes scan the page to find the way to join copy school with that a large upfront investment so just being empathetic towards that using it as an opportunity to outline more parts of the offer this time the payment plans really that's it so the last ones all have to do with offer related the early ones have to do with audience related who they are what their motivations are what they're looking to achieve and how they're already in the process of doing it how they're already investing and committing to that outcome through other means and just want to do it better faster easier through your product so that is the perfect for you if part of it but it really starts with just this very assertive kind of history lesson about what your relationship is what was that core intention for them to be on your email list and receiving this offer in the first place cool so second example we're going to scroll all the way down here this is from digital course academy maybe portafilters course the same same intro short history lesson at some point our past crossed you said hey me please show me how to do show me everything you know about creating and launching digital courses please show me how to outline organize and record my lessons in the most effectively possible show me how to actually launch my program with impact so that I could feel like my efforts had a massive payoff and behind it all teach me the advanced marketing strategies that allow me to make my course the cornerstone of my online business pulling profits in a time-loved way so that I can free myself from the time for money trap and only take on projects that I absolutely love and to that I say hold my bulletproof copy in case you missed it we just launched our brand new digital course academy this program has been years in the making I'm a take this land near from the ground up if you've been hanging around in our community for a while waiting for the right time to finally go all in this is it so very similar to the first one relational recap you know why your paths are crossing in the first place this is what your perfect buyer would be saying this is their role in our relationship and then having the first call to action as a way to just kind of make good on this relationship exchange that has already been agreed upon based on them opting in except this time instead of transitioning using resistance we're just saying that now is finally the time you have you know you've been waiting for the right time it's finally here so this is less about calling out the lizard brain and really about saying it's finally here we're finally ready to evolve our relationship where it was meant to be in the first place but I will offer you one important warning the goal isn't to create a fun little course that acts as a glorified calling card that you can offer to clients who can't afford to work with you this is all about creating and launching a massively profitable digital course that can be the primary revenue driver of your business for years to come so this is transitioning with the usp this is about reshaping your business to be more time leverage automated and personally freeing than it's ever been before therefore I only recommend that you consider spot if you could check out four of the following and then we run through a similar list of perfect for you if elements so that is it this is the couples therapy do consider sending it if you if it's been a while between when they opted in and when they're seeing an offer or if in that time in between you've been giving them a lot of great content that may not be related to the main offer signature product that you are trying to enroll them in or sell them on so that's it give it a shot and I'll see you in the final installment of seven figure
